query:
UPDATE portfolioTransactions pt
JOIN exchangeRates er ON 
  CONCAT(pt.currency, 'CHF') = er.currencyPair 
  AND DATE(pt.transactionDate) = er.date
SET 
  pt.fxRate = er.rate,
  pt.totalAmountCHF = ROUND(CAST(pt.shares AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * CAST(pt.pricePerShare AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * CAST(er.rate AS DECIMAL(10,4)), 2)
WHERE 
  pt.currency IN ('USD', 'EUR', 'GBP')
  AND (pt.fxRate IN ('1', '1.0', '1.00', '1.000') OR pt.fxRate IS NULL OR pt.fxRate = '0' OR pt.fxRate = '');
